text: Subdivision (d) of Section 28 of Article I of the California Constitution shall not be construed as abrogating the evidentiary provisions of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 3. Illegal Evidence [40800 - 40834]
#### Article 1. Prosecutions Under Code [40800 - 40808]
##### § 40808

Subdivision (d) of Section 28 of Article I of the California Constitution shall not be construed as abrogating the evidentiary provisions of this article.

*(Added by Stats. 1992, Ch. 538, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 1993.)*

subsections.text: Subdivision (d) of Section 28 of Article I of the California Constitution shall not be construed as abrogating the evidentiary provisions of this article.
